_description: Fixture descriptor for the end-to-end queue lifecycle scenario test (T80, hk-8vokz). Describes a 2-wave-group queue with 2 items in group 0 and 1 item in group 1. Used by internal/scenario/queue_lifecycle_test.go to assert: (a) group 0 dispatches both items in parallel; (b) group 1 activates only after group 0 is all-terminal; (c) queue.json is unlinked after group 1 completes.
